_note: This golden set was produced with the assistance of a premium language model, not assembled by hand. Labels were reviewed for consistency but were not manually authored from scratch.
methodology: Stratified sample by data-completeness class (B_rid_only, D_rname_only, E_mid_only, F_orphan). For each recipe: (1) restaurant_id from source if valid, else exact/high-fuzz (>=90) name lookup, else via_menu_id, else null. (2) menu_id from source if valid, else null. (3) ingredients: each token gets expected canonical NAME (not id) — exact in Ingredients.name, or fuzz>=92, or soft 80-92 retained, or null below 80. Eval compares by name so it is robust to ID-format differences across pipelines.
